install:
npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps
npm install --prefix frontend
python3 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]"
# Homebrew + Resend CLI (baked into snapshot; self-heal on cold boot)
if [ -x /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew ]; then
  eval "$(/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew shellenv bash)"
elif [ ! -x /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew ]; then
  NONINTERACTIVE=1 /bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)" || true
  [ -x /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew ] && eval "$(/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew shellenv bash)"
fi
grep -q 'linuxbrew.*brew shellenv' ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null || echo 'eval "$(/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew shellenv bash)"' >> ~/.bashrc
if ! command -v resend >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    brew install resend/cli/resend
  else
    curl -fsSL https://resend.com/install.sh | bash
    export PATH="$HOME/.resend/bin:$PATH"
  fi
fi
if [ -n "${RESEND_API_KEY:-}" ]; then
  resend login --key "$RESEND_API_KEY" --json >/dev/null || true
fi
resend --version

terminals.name: backend
terminals.description: Wait for Postgres, sync Drizzle schema (db:push), then run the Hono API on :3001
terminals.command: eval "$(/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew shellenv bash 2>/dev/null)" || true; until pg_isready -h localhost -q; do sleep 0.5; done; DATABASE_URL="postgres://app:dev@localhost:5432/app" npm run db:push --prefix backend && PORT=3001 DATABASE_URL="postgres://app:dev@localhost:5432/app" FRONTEND_ORIGIN="http://localhost:3000" BETTER_AUTH_SECRET="2hkee/0PTQo7QHLQsAJ7F+WQxnP6qzXF+Tbk4daNRGo=" BETTER_AUTH_URL="http://localhost:3001" RESEND_API_KEY="${RESEND_API_KEY:-}" EMAIL_FROM="${EMAIL_FROM:-Acme <onboarding@resend.dev>}" npm run dev --prefix backend
